text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: kwm

Log:
  Make the camel-lock-helper-1.2 application part of the mail group and set sgid.

  This allows evolution do do local mail delivery again.

  PR:		202119
  Submitted by:	mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
